items.title: Review auth token rotation pull request
items.body: Teammate is blocked on review before release freeze. Security labeled this high impact.

execution.definitionOfDone: PR receives actionable review or approval and release branch is unblocked.

items.title: Investigate flaky invoice export test
items.body: CI noise causing one retry per merge.

execution.definitionOfDone: Flaky test is either stabilized or quarantined with linked follow-up.

items.title: Fix payment webhook retry storm
items.body: Duplicate webhook deliveries are increasing queue latency and delaying customer notifications.

execution.definitionOfDone: Webhook retry volume is reduced below threshold and customer notifications are delivered once.

items.title: Review RBAC permission matrix update
items.body: Access control changes require approval before identity rollout.

execution.definitionOfDone: Permission changes are reviewed and approved.

items.title: Resolve search indexing delay
items.body: New records appear in search results after significant delay.

execution.definitionOfDone: Search indexing latency remains below five minutes.

items.title: Investigate mobile login timeout
items.body: Users report intermittent authentication failures on mobile devices.

execution.definitionOfDone: Authentication timeout issue is reproduced, fixed, and verified.

items.title: Review database failover automation
items.body: Database resilience changes require peer review before deployment.

execution.definitionOfDone: Failover automation changes are reviewed and approved.

items.title: Fix duplicate email notifications
items.body: Customers receive repeated status update emails.

execution.definitionOfDone: Duplicate notifications are eliminated across all workflows.

items.title: Audit secret scanning alerts
items.body: Multiple repositories were flagged for potential credential exposure.

execution.definitionOfDone: All alerts are triaged and exposed credentials are rotated.

items.title: Reduce CI pipeline execution time
items.body: Long build times are slowing release cadence.

execution.definitionOfDone: Average build duration is reduced by at least twenty percent.

items.title: Address API rate limiting alerts
items.body: Traffic spikes are causing elevated error rates for public APIs.

execution.definitionOfDone: API error rates return to baseline and rate limits are optimized.

items.title: Review customer data retention changes
items.body: Compliance update requires urgent engineering approval before release.

execution.definitionOfDone: Retention changes are reviewed and approved.

items.title: Fix broken Slack notification links
items.body: Users cannot open linked incidents directly from Slack messages.

execution.definitionOfDone: Slack notifications redirect users to the correct incident pages.

items.title: Implement GitHub issue auto-tagging
items.body: Reduce manual triage effort through workflow automation.

execution.definitionOfDone: New issues are automatically tagged based on content and labels.

items.title: Investigate cache invalidation bug
items.body: Users are seeing stale profile information after updates.

execution.definitionOfDone: Updated profile data is consistently reflected across services.

items.title: Review feature flag cleanup
items.body: Legacy feature flags must be removed before the next release.

execution.definitionOfDone: Flag cleanup changes are reviewed and merged.

items.title: Fix onboarding workflow failure
items.body: New users are unable to complete profile setup.

execution.definitionOfDone: Onboarding completion rates return to expected levels.

items.title: Upgrade observability agent
items.body: Current monitoring agent version is missing critical metrics.

execution.definitionOfDone: New agent version is deployed across all environments.

items.title: Review billing reconciliation changes
items.body: Finance release requires engineering sign-off before deployment.

execution.definitionOfDone: Reconciliation changes are reviewed and approved.

items.title: Optimize analytics dashboard query
items.body: Slow dashboards are impacting customer success workflows.

execution.definitionOfDone: Dashboard response time meets performance SLA.

items.title: Resolve duplicate session creation issue
items.body: Users are intermittently receiving multiple active sessions after login retries.

execution.definitionOfDone: Duplicate sessions are prevented across all authentication flows.

items.title: Investigate delayed invoice generation
items.body: Invoice creation jobs are delayed during peak processing windows.

execution.definitionOfDone: Invoices are generated within SLA limits.

items.title: Review Kubernetes autoscaling changes
items.body: Infrastructure update requires approval before production rollout.

execution.definitionOfDone: Autoscaling configuration is reviewed and approved.

items.title: Fix stale analytics cache
items.body: Dashboard metrics are showing outdated information.

execution.definitionOfDone: Dashboard metrics refresh correctly across all environments.

items.title: Optimize notification delivery queue
items.body: Message delays are increasing during traffic spikes.

execution.definitionOfDone: Notification latency remains within target SLA.

items.title: Investigate API gateway memory leak
items.body: Memory utilization continues to increase after traffic spikes.

execution.definitionOfDone: Memory usage stabilizes under peak load.

items.title: Review audit logging enhancements
items.body: Compliance release requires peer approval.

execution.definitionOfDone: Audit logging changes are approved and merged.

items.title: Automate dependency vulnerability reporting
items.body: Manual security triage is slowing remediation efforts.

execution.definitionOfDone: Automated reports identify vulnerable dependencies daily.

items.title: Fix webhook signature validation failures
items.body: Partner integrations are rejecting valid webhook events.

execution.definitionOfDone: Webhook signatures validate successfully for all partners.

items.title: Resolve OAuth token refresh failures
items.body: Users are being logged out unexpectedly when refresh tokens expire.

execution.definitionOfDone: Token refresh succeeds consistently across all clients.

items.title: Optimize invoice reconciliation jobs
items.body: Nightly reconciliation processing exceeds the scheduled execution window.

execution.definitionOfDone: Reconciliation jobs complete within target duration.

items.title: Review API gateway routing changes
items.body: Routing configuration updates require approval before release.

execution.definitionOfDone: Routing changes are reviewed and approved.

items.title: Fix delayed push notifications
items.body: Mobile users receive notifications several minutes after events occur.

execution.definitionOfDone: Push notifications are delivered within SLA targets.

items.title: Investigate intermittent analytics data gaps
items.body: Daily reports are missing data from selected customer accounts.

execution.definitionOfDone: Analytics reports contain complete and accurate data.

items.title: Upgrade container security policies
items.body: Current runtime policies do not meet updated security standards.

execution.definitionOfDone: Container workloads comply with updated security requirements.

items.title: Review infrastructure cost optimization changes
items.body: Cloud cost reduction initiative requires technical approval.

execution.definitionOfDone: Cost optimization changes are reviewed and approved.

items.title: Automate repository ownership validation
items.body: Missing code owners are slowing pull request reviews.

execution.definitionOfDone: All repositories enforce ownership validation automatically.

items.title: Fix partner API schema mismatch
items.body: Recent API changes introduced compatibility issues for integration partners.

execution.definitionOfDone: Partner integrations work correctly with the updated API schema.

items.title: Reduce flaky end-to-end test failures
items.body: Unstable tests are delaying merge approvals and release readiness.

execution.definitionOfDone: End-to-end test failure rate remains below one percent.

items.title: Investigate database connection pool exhaustion
items.body: API requests are intermittently failing during peak traffic due to connection shortages.

execution.definitionOfDone: Connection pool utilization remains stable under peak load.

items.title: Review authentication audit enhancements
items.body: Security improvements require peer approval before release.

execution.definitionOfDone: Audit enhancements are reviewed and merged.

items.title: Fix delayed billing webhook acknowledgements
items.body: External providers are retrying requests due to slow acknowledgement responses.

execution.definitionOfDone: Webhook acknowledgements are processed within SLA.

items.title: Optimize search query performance
items.body: Large customer accounts experience increased response times in search results.

execution.definitionOfDone: Search queries meet performance targets for enterprise accounts.

items.title: Implement automated release note generation
items.body: Manual release documentation is slowing deployment cycles.

execution.definitionOfDone: Release notes are automatically generated for each deployment.

items.title: Investigate message queue backlog growth
items.body: Notification processing delays increase significantly during traffic spikes.

execution.definitionOfDone: Queue backlog remains within operational thresholds.

items.title: Review incident response automation updates
items.body: SRE workflow improvements require engineering approval.

execution.definitionOfDone: Automation updates are reviewed and approved.

items.title: Resolve mobile session synchronization issue
items.body: Users experience inconsistent account state across multiple devices.

execution.definitionOfDone: Session state remains consistent across supported devices.

items.title: Automate infrastructure drift detection
items.body: Manual environment checks are delaying incident response.

execution.definitionOfDone: Infrastructure drift is detected automatically and reported.

items.title: Fix integration timeout during partner onboarding
items.body: Partner setup requests fail intermittently due to long-running API calls.

execution.definitionOfDone: Partner onboarding completes successfully within SLA.

items.title: Review distributed tracing instrumentation updates
items.body: Observability enhancements require approval before production deployment.

execution.definitionOfDone: Tracing updates are reviewed, approved, and ready for deployment.

items.title: Investigate failed user provisioning jobs
items.body: Enterprise user provisioning requests fail intermittently during bulk imports.

execution.definitionOfDone: Provisioning jobs complete successfully for all supported import formats.

items.title: Optimize recurring billing calculations
items.body: Monthly billing cycles are exceeding expected processing windows.

execution.definitionOfDone: Recurring billing jobs complete within target execution time.

items.title: Fix duplicate search indexing events
items.body: Redundant indexing operations are increasing infrastructure costs.

execution.definitionOfDone: Duplicate indexing events are eliminated across all services.

items.title: Investigate delayed SMS notifications
items.body: Critical customer alerts are arriving later than expected.

execution.definitionOfDone: SMS notifications are delivered within defined SLA targets.

items.title: Review infrastructure backup policy changes
items.body: Updated disaster recovery requirements need engineering approval.

execution.definitionOfDone: Backup policy updates are reviewed and approved.

items.title: Implement automated dependency update workflow
items.body: Outdated dependencies are increasing maintenance effort across repositories.

execution.definitionOfDone: Dependencies are automatically updated with review workflows.

items.title: Resolve API contract mismatch for partner integrations
items.body: Recent API changes introduced compatibility issues for enterprise partners.

execution.definitionOfDone: Partner integrations work correctly with the updated API contracts.

items.title: Reduce flaky deployment verification tests
items.body: Intermittent failures are delaying production deployments.

execution.definitionOfDone: Deployment verification tests pass consistently across environments.

items.title: Investigate high error rates in metrics ingestion pipeline
items.body: Monitoring dashboards are missing critical telemetry data.

execution.definitionOfDone: Telemetry ingestion error rates remain below acceptable thresholds.
